assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response configures Saturday maintenance windows with specific recurrence pattern 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' for weekend-only scheduling

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific command for Q4 code freeze exclusion with proper start/end dates and mentions 30-day maximum limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes separate command for November audit exclusion with specific dates (2024-11-01 to 2024-11-30)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Each no upgrades exclusion: 30 days maximum' and explains how to 'chain multiple exclusions' for longer freezes

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or clarify this distinction between manual and automatic upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended release channel specifically for 'maximum upgrade control' and explains the benefits in regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Provides complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end parameters for both quarterly and audit exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Includes warning about 'Extended exclusion periods can cause clusters to fall behind on patches' and advises planning 'catch-up windows between quarterly freezes'
